title: severinia retusa
intro: Severinia retusa, also known as the Chinese boxwood or Chinese box, is a species of evergreen tree native to southern China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Severinia retusa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as its ability to regulate blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Severinia retusa include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used topically in the form of ointments and creams.
